title: Fly Apple
description: This is a flying craft mod that allows you to fly in various ways, and there is also an exclusive fall resistance totem to ensure that you will not fall to death!
body:
This is a mod about flying food and flying staffs. You can eat these foods or use the staff to enable your flying mode!

Obtain [Floating Essence] by killing flying creatures. All items in this mod are crafted using [Floating Essence]!

When you obtain [Floating Essence], the corresponding recipes will be automatically unlocked. Be sure to check the little green book!
